title: microsorum phanerophlebium
intro: Microsorum phanerophlebium, also known as the Asian water clover or umbrella fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Microsorum phanerophlebium include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and even help manage diabetes, making it a popular herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
